meaning: n.鑷敱,鐗规潈,闅忔剰,鍐掑け,鍐掓槯,澶辩ぜ
examples: He firmly believes liberty is inseparable from social justice.
With a few keystrokes, Rebecca was connected to her computer at Liberty Air Service.
You are at liberty to say what you like.
Throughout our history, Americans have risen to the challenge of defending our country and our liberty.
The idea is to ward off rapidly growing competitors Liberty Tax Service and Jackson Hewitt.
